hooks.command: bash -c 'R=$PWD; diffs=$(diff "$R/claude/CLAUDE.md" "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null; diff "$R/claude/settings.json" "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$diffs" ]; then cd "$R" && git pull --ff-only 2>&1 | head -3; cp "$R/claude/CLAUDE.md" "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md"; cp "$R/claude/settings.json" "$HOME/.claude/settings.json"; echo "sync:ok（本機設定已更新）"; else echo "sync:diff"; echo "$diffs"; fi'
